pi_items.source: Task description states to save as Customer_Frequency_Dist. DVA is the default Oracle Analytics format.
setup_oracle_analytics.ps1 copies sample_order_lines2023.xlsx to OracleAnalyticsData folder, contradicting the metadata path.
Task description explicitly asks for calculation named Orders Per Customer.
Task description explicitly asks for a Bar Chart.
verifier.py expects a size greater than 5000 bytes (5KB).

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a Bar Chart using a calculation named Orders Per Customer, saved as Customer_Frequency_Dist.dva. The dataset provided by the environment setup is sample_order_lines2023.xlsx located in OracleAnalyticsData, not sample_order_lines.xlsx directly on the Desktop as claimed. The verifier enforces a file size of at least 5KB, contradicting the 10KB metadata claim.
